themes.theme: US-Iran peace talks and Strait of Hormuz proposal driving broad risk sentiment and oil volatility
USD broadly weak on Fed leadership uncertainty and US-Iran de-escalation hopes
Surging oil prices boosting commodity/energy-linked currencies and complicating central bank calculus
Critical central bank week: BoJ hike signal, Fed caution, ECB/BoE decisions all imminent

key_observation: Oil approaching $100 and gold above $4,700 simultaneously suggests markets are pricing Iran peace hopes into the dollar but NOT into commodities, creating a disconnect that will resolve violently if talks collapse.
watch: BoJ policy decision this week — USD/JPY testing 159.20 breakout zone with markets pricing a June hike signal, making JPY the highest-convexity G10 trade.
